title: iris × germanica var. illyrica
intro: Iris × germanica var. illyrica, also known as the Dalmatian Iris, is a perennial flowering plant in the iris family that originates from the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iris × germanica var. illyrica include alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as providing relief from skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of the plant is typically dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
